indigo-anchor.notes: Carried unchanged across dark and light modes — identity continuity is intentional.

violet-signal.notes: Differentiation only — never a peer to Indigo Anchor on the same screen.

light-bg-card.notes: The one place the system goes to pure white — paired only with Indigo Mist as the page background.

dark-ledger-green.notes: Credit, on-budget, positive delta. Always semantic, never decorative.

display.purpose: KPI headline numbers. Tight tracking (-0.02em) makes currency read as one shape.

display-emphasis.purpose: The single primary KPI per section, when one matters more than its peers.

brand.purpose: Sidebar wordmark — Finanças (regular) above Pessoais (italic, Violet Signal). The one place italic is sanctioned.

title.purpose: Active nav item, section headings inside cards.

body.purpose: Default reading size — dense but legible at 13px.

body-small.purpose: Row labels, supporting copy, compact MonthNavigator.

label.purpose: KPI eyebrows in uppercase. The one place the system shouts — softly.

micro.purpose: TipoChips, brand subscript, version stamp. 10px uppercase with high tracking.

motion.name: ease-color
motion.purpose: Color transitions on nav items, step buttons, theme toggle. Short and unceremonious.

motion.name: spin-loader
motion.purpose: The only continuous animation in the system — the page-level spinner.

components.name: Card
components.description: The base flat surface — 1px border, 4px radius, 24px padding, no shadow.
components.html:
Cartão de exemplo
Conteúdo do cartão. Linha tipográfica calma, sem decoração.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #12152a; border: 1px solid #252848; border-radius: 4px; padding: 24px; color: #e0e6ff; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; max-width: 360px; } .ds-card-eyebrow { font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.15em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #555c88; margin-bottom: 12px; font-weight: 500; } .ds-card-body { font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.5; color: #e0e6ff; }

components.name: KPI
components.description: Labeled-number signature element. Eyebrow label + tight-tracked display number + optional delta badge.
components.html:
Receita
R$ 18.420+4%
components.css: .ds-kpi { background: #12152a; border: 1px solid #252848; border-radius: 4px; padding: 24px; color: #e0e6ff; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; min-width: 240px; } .ds-kpi-label { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.15em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #555c88; margin-bottom: 12px; font-weight: 500; } .ds-kpi-value { font-family: 'Google Sans Flex', 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 30px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1; letter-spacing: -0.02em; color: #e0e6ff; display: flex; align-items: baseline; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 6px; } .ds-delta-up { font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 0; color: #34d399; }

components.name: Sidebar Nav Item (Active)
components.description: Active state in the desktop sidebar — 3×16 left indicator bar, accent-tinted background, accent text.
components.css: .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; width: 188px; padding: 10px 12px; border-radius: 10px; border: none; background: transparent; color: #8b94c4; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 400; text-align: left; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.12s, color 0.12s; margin-bottom: 2px; } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: #1e2240; color: #e0e6ff; } .ds-nav-item-active { background: rgba(99,102,241,0.14); color: #6366f1; font-weight: 600; } .ds-nav-bar { width: 3px; height: 16px; border-radius: 2px; flex-shrink: 0; background: transparent; } .ds-nav-item-active .ds-nav-bar { background: #6366f1; }

components.name: TipoChip — Crédito
components.description: Transaction-type tag. Tight 3px radius, 10px uppercase, 12% alpha background of the feedback color.
components.html: Crédito Débito Transferência
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-block; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; border-radius: 3px; padding: 2px 6px; white-space: nowrap; margin-right: 4px; } .ds-chip-credito { background: rgba(52,211,153,0.12); color: #34d399; border: 1px solid rgba(52,211,153,0.2); } .ds-chip-debito { background: rgba(248,113,113,0.12); color: #f87171; border: 1px solid rgba(248,113,113,0.2); } .ds-chip-transf { background: rgba(96,165,250,0.12); color: #60a5fa; border: 1px solid rgba(96,165,250,0.2); }

components.name: Step Button
components.description: Outlined 28×28 chevron used in MonthNavigator, drilldowns, anywhere a paired ‹ › appears.
components.html: Abr 2026
components.css: .ds-step { width: 28px; height: 28px; border-radius: 6px; border: 1px solid #252848; background: transparent; color: #8b94c4; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; cursor: pointer; padding: 0; transition: background 0.12s, color 0.12s, border-color 0.12s; } .ds-step:hover { background: #1e2240; color: #e0e6ff; border-color: #6366f1; }

components.name: Theme Toggle
components.description: Outlined utility button — sun/moon icon + label. Sits in the sidebar footer.
components.html: <button class="ds-theme-toggle" aria-label="Alternar para modo claro"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="4"/><path d="M12 2v2M12 20v2M4.93 4.93l1.41 1.41M17.66 17.66l1.41 1.41M2 12h2M20 12h2M4.93 19.07l1.41-1.41M17.66 6.34l1.41-1.41"/></svg>Modo claro</button>
components.css: .ds-theme-toggle { width: 188px; padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 10px; border: 1px solid #252848; background: transparent; color: #555c88; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: color 0.12s, border-color 0.12s; } .ds-theme-toggle:hover { color: #e0e6ff; border-color: #6366f1; }

components.name: Primary Button (Login)
components.description: The one solid-fill button in the system — only used as the Login form submit. Inverse text (page color on accent).
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { width: 280px; padding: 10px 16px; border: none; border-radius: 8px; background: #6366f1; color: #0d0f1a; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.12s, transform 0.12s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #818cf8; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #6366f1; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Inline Error Banner
components.description: The system's only inline feedback surface. Rendered above a tab when its data fetch fails. Today uses a 3px violet stripe (legacy); future replacement uses a full 1px Ledger-Red border + tinted background per the Side-Stripe Don't.
components.html:
Erro: não foi possível carregar /api/summary
Verifique se o backend está rodando.
components.css: .ds-error { background: #12152a; border: 1px solid #f87171; border-radius: 4px; padding: 24px; color: #e0e6ff; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; max-width: 480px; } .ds-error-title { color: #f87171; font-size: 13px; display: flex; gap: 8px; align-items: center; } .ds-error-help { color: #555c88; font-size: 12px; margin-top: 8px; }

components.name: Sparkline
components.description: Inline SVG trend rendered below a KPI value. Stroke 1.5px in the accent color, gradient fill from 0.28→0 alpha.
components.html: Saldo · 12 meses

narrative.overview: A ledger does not flatter you. It records, in precise rows and consistent columns, what is. Finanças Pessoais is that ledger as a dashboard — quiet enough to read at 7am with coffee, honest enough to hold up under a partner's questions, sharp enough that density feels like care, not clutter. Visually, the system is monochromatic indigo with a single saturated accent that earns its rarity. There are no gradients carrying decoration, no shadows imitating depth, no celebratory states. When a number is positive it's green; when it's negative it's red; both are stated plainly. Dark mode and light mode are equal citizens — neither is the 'true' view, both must hit the same calm.
keyCharacteristics: Indigo-violet identity (#6366f1) carries across both modes unchanged.
Dual-mode is first-class; the app remounts on theme flip so every value is honest in either mode.
Flat by default — depth from 1px borders and tonal layering, never shadows.
Display type is geometric (Google Sans Flex); body is humanist sans (Plus Jakarta Sans). One pairing.
Ledger-precise components — chips are tight (3px radius, 10px label), KPI numbers are large but leading-tight (letter-spacing -0.02em).
Inline before modal: drilldowns expand in place; the only modal-like surface is the Login form.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Indigo Anchor and Violet Signal together cover ≤10% of any given screen. Their rarity is the point.

rules.name: The Honest Color Rule
rules.body: Color carries meaning, not decoration. A number is green because it's positive, never because green looks nice.

rules.name: The Two-Mode Equality Rule
rules.body: Dark and light are not 'default + alternate'. Every component must hit the same personality in both.

rules.name: The Tinted-Neutral Rule
rules.body: Pure black (#000) and pure white (#fff) are forbidden. Every neutral carries a faint indigo tint.

rules.name: The Two-Family Rule
rules.body: Google Sans Flex for display, Plus Jakarta Sans for everything else. No third face.

rules.name: The Tight-Number Rule
rules.body: All KPI numerals use letter-spacing -0.02em. Currency reads as a single shape.

rules.name: The Quiet-Caps Rule
rules.body: Uppercase is reserved for labels and chips at 10–11px with high tracking. Body and titles are never uppercased.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: A box-shadow on a card, KPI, button, or chip is forbidden. If you reach for one, reach for a tonal step instead.

rules.name: The Tonal-Depth Rule
rules.body: Three depth levels: bg.page, bg.card, bg.cardAlt. Going deeper or nesting cards is forbidden.

rules.name: The 1px Border Rule
rules.body: Every card border is 1px solid border.default. Internal partitions are 1px solid border.subtle. Nothing thicker, nothing colored.

dos: Do keep Indigo Anchor (#6366f1) and Violet Signal (#8b5cf6) at ≤10% of any screen.
Do convey depth through tonal step (bg.page → bg.card → bg.cardAlt), 1px borders, and spacing. Three layers maximum.
Do tint every neutral toward indigo. #0d0f1a not #000; #f0f1ff not #fff.
Do show ··· while a number is loading. A missing value is honest about being missing.
Do use feedback colors only with semantic backing — Ledger Green is credit, Ledger Red is debit.
Do prefer inline drilldowns and expansions. Resumo's KPI cards expand in place; follow that pattern.
Do apply letter-spacing -0.02em to every KPI number.
Do capitalize body and titles; reserve uppercase for 10–11px labels and chips with ≥0.05em tracking.
Do make dark and light hit the same personality. Verify in both modes before shipping.
donts: Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored stripe on cards, KPIs, alerts, or rows. The active-nav 3×16 indicator is allowed because it's an inline mark; a parent-element side-stripe is not.
Don't put a box-shadow on a card, KPI, button, or chip.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text). Emphasis comes from weight or size.
Don't reach for glassmorphism (backdrop-filter: blur) anywhere.
Don't introduce a third font family.
Don't build the hero-metric SaaS template (big number + tiny label + gradient accent + supporting stats grid).
Don't copy consumer-finance app patterns — Mint, Nubank, emoji-laden 'spending insight' cards, gamified savings goals, celebratory toasts.
Don't copy crypto / fintech maximalism — neon on black, animated gradients, glassmorphism stacks.
Don't reach for a modal as the first thought. Modals exist only for focused capture, destructive confirmation, or genuinely interrupting flows.
Don't drift back toward the warm-brown editorial palette retired in Fase U.
Don't use a shadow, gradient, or animation just because the surface 'looks empty'.
Don't write celebratory copy. The number is the message; the user decides how to feel about it.
